name: @slothfulchat/core-wasm
description: chatmail core compiled to WebAssembly, exposed through the standard @deltachat/jsonrpc-client TypeScript API. Core runs in a Web Worker.

scripts.build:wasm: cd rust && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir ../wasm-dist && rm -f ../wasm-dist/.gitignore
scripts.build:wasm:ci: cd rust && wasm-pack build --target web --release --no-opt --out-dir ../wasm-dist && rm -f ../wasm-dist/.gitignore
